T0020.title: Compensation Abuse
T0020.definition: A homophone for 'compensation,' referring to cash refunds issued for product quality or authenticity issues during after-sales. In this context, it specifically denotes malicious refund fraud where cybercriminals exploit platform loopholes or business rules to illicitly obtain payouts.

T0020.usageExample: 那帮人专门买有运费险的商品，收到货就挑刺申请赔付，一个月能搞不少钱。

references.title: Internet black and gray industry research report in the first half of 2024
